summary: Iteration 83 - Bug Fixes Verified: 1) Daily Report PDF detail mode now uses landscape A4, 2) Local Party cashbook payments no longer double-counted. Also fixed Excel export KeyError bug.

success_rate.frontend: Not fully tested due to navigation issues, but backend API verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: Two bug fixes verified: 1) Daily Report PDF in detail mode uses landscape A4 with proper mm conversion for 20-column paddy table, 2) Local Party report now correctly excludes voucher_payment_ledger entries when voucher_payment entry exists (using ref ID matching). Also fixed Excel export bug where total_kg was used instead of total_qntl.

bug_1_daily_report_pdf_detail_mode.fix_verified: PDF uses landscape(A4) for detail mode, portrait for normal
details: Detail mode PDF successfully generated with landscape orientation
Normal mode PDF successfully generated with portrait orientation
Detail mode includes all 20 columns for paddy entries table
Column widths properly converted using mm factor in detail mode

bug_2_local_party_cashbook_double_counti.fix_verified: Cashbook payments with voucher_payment_ledger: prefix excluded when voucher_payment: entry exists
details: Gayatri Agro balance now matches: Summary=0.0, Report=0.0 (was -32400.0 due to double-counting)
Dedup logic added: Extract ref IDs from voucher_payment:xxx entries and skip voucher_payment_ledger:xxx with matching ID
No duplicate transaction IDs found in party reports
Manual cashbook payments (without voucher_payment ref) still included correctly

bug_3_excel_export_fix.fix_verified: Changed total_kg to total_qntl in Excel export
details: Fixed KeyError: 'total_kg' in daily report Excel export
Changed from 'Paddy Purchase: KG' to 'Paddy Purchase: Qntl' format
Updated column headers from Variety/KG/Vehicle to Mandi/Qntl/Truck

code_changes_made.daily_report.py_line_783: Changed pp['total_kg'] to pp['total_qntl'] and updated headers/fields
code_changes_made.local_party.py_lines_173-200: Added existing_ref_ids set to extract IDs from references and skip voucher_payment_ledger entries with matching IDs
code_changes_made.local_party.py_lines_118-140: Same dedup fix applied to get_local_party_transactions function
